title: Align Meshtastic app-compat sync ordering vectors with adapter
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.15 review found test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json lists stage-1 sync order as my_info, metadata, config, moduleConfig, channel, region_presets, while the active Zephyr adapter/test queues region_presets before config. What needs to be done: decide whether ordering must match current mobile app expectations or is intentionally flexible, then align the JSON vector, adapter, and ztests. Acceptance criteria: canonical vector and native_sim tests agree; ordering decision is recorded; mobile smoke script checks the selected ordering if apps are order-sensitive.
